unavailable_text: 2016-12-22	BODY ATTACHMENT ISSUED CIVIL WARRANT BODY ATTACHMENT (BENCH WARRANT) ISSUED THIS DATE FOR GREGORY ARMIJO FROM COURT HEARING OF 11/22/2016 AT 8:30 AM WITH $1500.00 CASH BAIL AND VOLUNTARY RETURN RESTRICTED TO ANY FRIDAY MORNING OR PRODUCTION BY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ON ANY WEEK DAY.
